description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Documentation Docker image that builds and pushes a Docker image to ghcr.io. The workflow triggers on workflow dispatch, push to specific branches and tags, and pull requests to certain branches. Use an ubuntu-24.04-arm job with read contents and write packages permissions. Check out the repository, log in to the Container registry using DOCKER_TOKEN from secrets, extract metadata for Docker, and build and push the Docker image with specific context, file, and labels.
